data.content: I can see your MSTest project. The express delivery test expects `15.00` but the method returns `10.00`, so that test will fail. Let me start `dotnet watch test` for you — it'll re-run tests automatically whenever you save a file.

toolRequests.name: bash

arguments.description: Start dotnet watch test for hot reload

toolRequests.intentionSummary: Start dotnet watch test for hot reload

data.reasoningText:
The user wants to set up hot reload for iterating on failing tests. I can see this is an MSTest project targeting .NET 8. The `dotnet watch test` command is the way to do hot reload for tests.

Let me start `dotnet watch test` in async mode so they can iterate.

arguments.description: Start dotnet watch test for hot reload

toolCalls.name: bash
toolCalls.args: {"command": "cd /tmp/sv-833a9ac8a37d49b99a2b0f73e425ff7a && dotnet watch test --no-hot-reload", "description": "Start dotnet watch test for hot reload", "mode": "async"}
